flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Sisseton Wahpeton College are 31% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($31.5k vs $45.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Sisseton Wahpeton College rose 229% between 2022 and 2024 (6.2% → 20.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Sisseton Wahpeton College rose 58% between 2018 and 2021 (32.8% → 51.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Sisseton Wahpeton College rose 48% between 2021 and 2024 (131 → 194).
